name: autobib
description: AutoBib - Word Add-in: AI Multi-Provider + Mendeley Integration

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,WORD" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run serve --workspace=frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=backend && npm install --workspace=frontend
